basis: endure/remain = persistence act/state, not an inner faculty named
to remind = act on another memory faculty
perseverance/endurance = sustained act/disposition, not a named inner capacity
submission = relational/social state, not an inner faculty
to subject/submit = act of ordering-under, not an inner faculty
high/lofty = spatial/figurative attribute; not an inner capacity
be arrogant/haughty-minded (-froneo) = a stance of the thinking faculty
evil/worthless = moral quality assessed vs a standard
news/report/rumour = thing heard; borderline -> perception of report
lover of good = love/affection oriented to good
loving the brothers = affection (adj of one who loves)
hospitality = relational act toward strangers; not a core faculty
to aspire/aim/ambition = resolve/striving of the will
fearful thing/terror = object inducing fear; perceived + affect
mindset/purpose = the mind set disposition (cognition + intent)
to inflate/puff up = arrogant-mindedness; stance of thought
to give grace/forgive = gracious affectionate act; affect-driven
grace/favour = relational gift/quality, not an inner faculty (a state/thing bestowed)
be kind = kindly affection in action
good/kind/easy = quality attribute; not an inner faculty named
soul/inner self = seat of inner life; faculty-bearing seat
little faith = a state/measure of faith, not the faculty itself
fool = deficiency of the cognitive/wisdom faculty
sign/miraculous = thing/marker (token), not an inner faculty
cruel/fierce = harsh quality; behaviour, not an inner faculty
faithful = reliability quality/state, not a faculty named
be faithful/believe = trust-as-commitment of the will
be strong/courageous/be-resolute = volitional resolve (strengthen the heart)
to prolong/make-long = extension act (homograph long); not affect
be guilty = guilt (conscience witness) + culpability vs standard
guilt offering = thing/ritual; record of guilt
to stink/be odious = physical/figurative repugnance act/state
mind (Aramaic bal, heart/mind) = seat of thought
to seek/seek-after = volitional pursuit (not mere perception)
proud = quality attribute (pride disposition); not a core faculty
to rise up/triumph/be-lifted = exaltation act (pride context)
pride = self-exalting disposition; attitude not a core faculty
to judge/vindicate = judging vs a standard
to crush/be-contrite = physical (and fig.) crushing act
abhorrence/contempt = disdainful evaluation (and the object abhorred)
desire/craving (also ruin) = engulfing desire; core gloss desire
plan/plot (noun, esp evil plot) = devised scheme; cognition-product
to fornicate/play-the-whore = illicit desire act; core = misdirected desire
to cry out = vocal act (distress cry)
to strengthen/be-strong = physical/figurative strengthening act; not affect
to persevere/work-resolutely/stand-firm = resolve of the will
to sin/miss-the-mark = moral failure vs standard
sinner = one assessed sinful vs standard (person+evaluation)
to wait/long-for = expectant longing; affect (hopeful waiting)
be grieved/sorry = grief emotion (this homonym sense)
